examples: Just like the math problem, is a test of intelligence, a game of ratiocination and a race of time.
The judicial and logical bases of this law system are plead-procedure of trial and particular judicial ratiocination.
While Watson was a man of average intelligence, Holmes was a genius, whose gift for ratiocination made him a superb detective.
Many of the attacks on Patton were notable for their infinitesimal ratio of ratiocination to emotion.
